creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Oliver, can you please post config.log, compressed if need be? Because that will contain the exact reason why it could not detect the blocks runtime.

Even after r309124 which imported clang 3.9.0, there is still definitely a blocks runtime available, which you can check in /usr/lib:

$ ls -l /usr/lib/libBlocksRuntime*
-r--r--r--  1 root  wheel  8966 2016-11-25 09:43:15 /usr/lib/libBlocksRuntime.a
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel    21 2016-11-25 09:43:15 /usr/lib/libBlocksRuntime.so@ -> libBlocksRuntime.so.0
-r--r--r--  1 root  wheel  8080 2016-11-25 09:43:15 /usr/lib/libBlocksRuntime.so.0
-r--r--r--  1 root  wheel  9478 2016-11-25 09:43:15 /usr/lib/libBlocksRuntime_p.a
